{{Quote|Full speed to Kiilimaar!|an Imperial Commander|<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref>}}
'''Kiilimaar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Kiilimaar was the site of a battle between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Rneekii]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] shortly prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It began with a dispute over an abducted [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] R&D [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]], in which the Rneekii demanded a ransom for the scientist's safe return. The Empire tricked the Rneekii by handing over the ransom, retrieving the scientist, then sending their code to attack the Rneekii "full speed to Kiilimaar" and take back the ransom into Imperial hands. The Rneekii pirate forces were destroyed by [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] attack led by famous Imperial [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].
